scripts.build: bash ../../bun.sh run clean:production && tsgo --project tsconfig.json --outDir ./dist/production --noEmit false
scripts.build:experimental: bash ../../bun.sh run clean:experimental && tsgo --project tsconfig.json --outDir ./dist/experimental --noEmit false
scripts.predev: bash -lc 'pids=$(lsof -ti :3000 || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids || true; sleep 1; pids2=$(lsof -ti :3000 || true); if [ -n "$pids2" ]; then kill -9 $pids2 || true; fi; fi'
scripts.dev: bash ../../bun.sh run clean:experimental && tsgo --project tsconfig.json --outDir ./dist/experimental --noEmit false && concurrently --kill-others --names "TSGO,API" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "tsgo --project tsconfig.json --watch --outDir ./dist/experimental --noEmit false" "bash ../../bun.sh --watch ./server.bun.ts"
scripts.__comment_test__: The main test script below uses concurrently to run the mock provider, server and the test runner
scripts.test: concurrently --kill-others --success first --names "MOCK,API,TEST" -c "bgYellow.bold,bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "bash ../../bun.sh run test:mock" "bash ../../bun.sh run test:dev" "wait-on tcp:localhost:3101 tcp:localhost:3100 && bash ../../bun.sh run test:run && bash ../../bun.sh run test:sdk"
scripts.test:dev: bash -lc 'cleanup(){ bash ../../bun.sh run ./dev/testSetupCli.ts restore >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM; NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:-test} DATA_SOURCE_PREFERENCE=${DATA_SOURCE_PREFERENCE:-filesystem} DATA_CACHE_TTL_MS=${DATA_CACHE_TTL_MS:-600000} API_PROVIDERS_FILE=${API_PROVIDERS_FILE:-.test-data/providers.json} API_KEYS_FILE=${API_KEYS_FILE:-.test-data/keys.json} API_MODELS_FILE=${API_MODELS_FILE:-.test-data/models.json} PORT=${TEST_DEV_PORT:-3100} CLUSTER_WORKERS=${TEST_CLUSTER_WORKERS:-0} PORT_RETRY_COUNT=${TEST_PORT_RETRY_COUNT:-0} REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL:-} REDIS_USERNAME=${REDIS_USERNAME:-} REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD:-} REDIS_TLS=${REDIS_TLS:-false} REDIS_DB=${REDIS_DB:-0} REDIS_STARTUP_WAIT=${REDIS_STARTUP_WAIT:-0} SKIP_ADMIN_KEY_SYNC=${SKIP_ADMIN_KEY_SYNC:-1} bash ../../bun.sh run ./dev/testSetupCli.ts setup && bash ../../bun.sh run ./server.bun.ts'
